subtopics.title: What's in the Box
subtopics.content:
#### Player-Count Audit (from provided rulebook text)
- **Supported players** — 2 to 4 players.
- **2-player scoring-token adjustment** — Remove 3 darkest green 4-leaf scoring tokens.
- **2-player collection fallback** — When collecting from middle 4-leaf space, take from 3-leaf stack instead.
- **4-player setup shown** — Example diagram explicitly shows 4-player setup.
- **Advanced variation mention** — Optional rules include using the 4th Sun Revolution Counter.

#### Core Board Components
- **Game board** — 1.
- **Sun segment** — 1.
- **Sun Revolution counters** — 4.
- **First Player token** — 1.

#### Player Components
- **Player boards** — 4.
- **Light Point trackers** — 4.

#### Tree and Seed Components
- **Seed tokens** — 24 total (6 per variety).
- **Small trees** — 32 total (8 per variety).
- **Medium trees** — 16 total (4 per variety).
- **Large trees** — 8 total (2 per variety).

#### Scoring Components
- **Scoring tokens** — 24 total.

#### Rulebook
- **Illustrated rules** — 1.

subtopics.title: Board Layout
subtopics.content:
#### Setup Sequence
1. **Main board** — Place in center of table.
2. **Scoring stacks** — Build 4 piles by shade/leaf type, highest values on top.
3. **Sun segment** — Place on printed sun symbol.
4. **Revolution counters** — Place 1st, 2nd, 3rd counters on board edge in order.
5. **Initial tree placement pass 1** — In turn order, each player places 1 available Small Tree on external edge (1-leaf zone).
6. **Initial tree placement pass 2** — Repeat so each player has 2 Small Trees on map.

#### Player-Count Adjustment
--- 2 Players ---
- **Scoring tokens removed** — Remove the 3 darkest green 4-leaf tokens from the game.
- **Collection substitution** — If collecting from middle 4-leaf space, take token from 3-leaf stack instead.

#### Advanced Variation Note
- **4th Revolution Counter** — Leave in box for base game; include only if using advanced variation.

subtopics.title: Player Setup
subtopics.content:
#### What Each Player Receives
- **Player board** — 1.
- **Light Point tracker** — 1.
- **Seeds** — 6.
- **Trees** — 14 total (8 Small, 4 Medium, 2 Large).

#### What Goes On Your Board
- **Seeds placed on board** — 4.
- **Small trees placed on board** — 4.
- **Medium trees placed on board** — 3.
- **Large trees placed on board** — 2.
- **Starting light** — Set tracker to 0.

#### What Starts in Available Area
- **Seeds available immediately** — 2.
- **Small trees available immediately** — 4.
- **Medium trees available immediately** — 1.
- **Use rule** — These available pieces can be planted/grown without buying first.

subtopics.title: Starting the Game
subtopics.content:
#### Start-of-Game Conditions
- **First player** — Youngest player takes First Player Token.
- **Opening map state** — Each player has placed 2 Small Trees on external edge spaces.
- **Sun placement** — Sun segment starts on printed sun symbol.

#### First-Round Exception
- **No sun movement in round 1** — Skip sun move at first Photosynthesis Phase.
- **Normal movement from round 2 onward** — First Player moves sun clockwise to next angle.

#### Turn-order baseline
- **Life Cycle order** — Clockwise, starting with First Player holder.

subtopics.title: Turn Structure
subtopics.content:
#### Round Structure (in order)
1. **Photosynthesis Phase**
   - **Sun move** — First Player moves sun clockwise to next angle (skip in round 1).
   - **Light collection** — Score light from unshadowed trees.
   - **Light values** — Small = 1, Medium = 2, Large = 3, Seeds = 0.
   - **Light cap** — Max 20 stored light; excess is lost.
2. **Life Cycle Phase**
   - **Turn order** — Clockwise from First Player.
   - **Action budget** — Spend any amount of light on legal actions, in chosen order.
   - **Turn handoff** — Next player acts after current player finishes all chosen actions.
3. **Round end**
   - **First Player token pass** — Pass clockwise.
   - **Revolution tracking** — Remove top Revolution Counter when sun completes a full revolution.

#### Game-Length Values
- **Base game revolutions** — 3 revolutions.
- **Base game rounds** — 18 total rounds.

subtopics.title: Actions & Options
subtopics.content:
#### Action A: Buying
- **Purpose** — Move seeds/trees from Player Board storage to available area.
- **Payment** — Spend printed light cost.
- **Purchase path** — Buy bottom-to-top in a column (least to most expensive).

#### Action B: Plant a Seed
- **Cost** — 1 light per seed planted.
- **Seed source** — Must come from your available area.
- **Origin requirement** — Seed is planted from one of your existing trees.
- **Range by origin size**
  - **Small origin** — 1 space away.
  - **Medium origin** — Up to 2 spaces away.
  - **Large origin** — Up to 3 spaces away.
- **Path rule** — May plant in any connected direction (not required to be straight).
- **Activation impact** — Origin space and destination space both activate.

#### Action C: Grow a Piece
- **Growth chain only** — Seed → Small → Medium → Large.
- **Costs**
  - **Seed to Small** — 1 light.
  - **Small to Medium** — 2 light.
  - **Medium to Large** — 3 light.
- **New piece source** — Must come from available area.
- **Replaced piece return** — Return removed piece to topmost open matching storage on Player Board.
- **Overflow discard** — If no matching storage space is open, discard removed piece to box for rest of game.

#### Action D: Collect a Large Tree
- **Cost** — 4 light per collected Large Tree.
- **Board effect** — Remove Large Tree from map and return to topmost open Large slot on Player Board.
- **Token gain** — Take top scoring token from matching soil pile.
- **Pile-empty fallback** — If matching pile is empty, take from next pile as directed by rules.
- **Space release** — Collected tree space can be planted into later that round.

#### Activation Rule (critical)
- **One action per board space per turn** — You cannot act twice on the same map space in one turn.
- **Buying exception** — Buying does not activate map spaces.
- **Illegal combo examples** — Plant then grow same seed; grow then seed from same tree; collect then plant same space.

subtopics.title: Special Mechanics
subtopics.content:
#### Shadow System
- **Shadow direction** — Opposite the sun.
- **Who gets shadowed** — Trees of same size or smaller than shadow caster.
- **Who ignores shadow** — Trees taller than the shadow caster.
- **Shadow persistence** — Shadowed trees still cast shadows.
- **Shadow ranges**
  - **Small tree** — 1 space shadow.
  - **Medium tree** — 2 space shadow.
  - **Large tree** — 3 space shadow.

#### Light Economy
- **Carryover** — Light persists round to round.
- **Hard cap** — Max 20 light stored.
- **Efficiency pressure** — Excess light is lost, so spending timing matters.

#### Piece-Cycle Economy
- **Available area gate** — You can only plant/grow with pieces currently in available area.
- **Return loop** — Replaced/collected pieces return to Player Board storage when possible.
- **Box-out risk** — If no storage slot is open, the piece is removed from game.

#### Soil-Value Race
- **Token stack timing** — Top tokens are highest value in each soil stack.
- **Fallback collection** — Empty target stack forces collection from next stack per rules.

#### Player-Count and Variant Differences
--- 2 Players ---
- **Middle 4-leaf collection** — Uses 3-leaf stack due to removed tokens.

#### Advanced Variation Options
- **Option 1** — Add 4th Sun Revolution Counter for longer game.
- **Option 2** — Forbid planting/growing if the seed/tree is currently shadowed.

subtopics.title: Endgame & Scoring
subtopics.content:
#### End Trigger
- **Game end condition** — End when the sun completes 3 revolutions and the last Sun Revolution Counter is drawn.
- **Round count** — 18 rounds in base game.
- **Final-round sun position** — 6th sun position (the one before printed sun symbol).

#### Final Scoring Sources
- **Scoring tokens** — Sum all points printed on collected Scoring Tokens.
- **Unused light bonus** — +1 point per full 3 unused Light Points.
- **Remainder rule** — 0-2 unused light gives no bonus.

#### Winner and Tie-breakers
- **Primary winner** — Highest total points.
- **Tie-breaker 1** — Most seeds + trees on main board wins tie.
- **Tie-breaker 2** — If still tied, tied players share victory.

subtopics.title: Opening Priorities
subtopics.content:
#### Early-Game Priorities
- **Sun-lane planning** — Place first growth where trees will remain productive across multiple upcoming sun angles.
- **Use free availability first** — Convert starting available pieces (2 Seeds, 4 Small, 1 Medium) into board value before heavy buying.
- **Mixed-size pipeline** — Build at least one Medium early to improve light intake and seed range.
- **Light-cap discipline** — Spend before you overcap at 20 light.

#### Action-Order Priorities
- **Activation-safe sequencing** — Split actions across different spaces to avoid illegal same-space chains.
- **Collection timing** — Harvest high-value soil stacks before top-value tokens disappear.

#### Player-Count Priorities
--- 2 Players ---
- **Token-race awareness** — 4-leaf token adjustment changes relative value pacing; watch 3-leaf stack pressure closely.

subtopics.title: Common Mistakes
subtopics.content:
#### Frequent Mistakes
- **Overcapping light** — Ending rounds at 20 and wasting incoming production.
- **Buying without deployment plan** — Spending light to move pieces to available area but not converting them on board.
- **Breaking activation rule** — Attempting two actions on same board space in one turn.
- **Blind upgrades** — Growing trees without checking next sun-angle shadow risk.
- **Late harvesting** — Waiting until rich-soil top tokens are gone.
- **Ignoring tie-break** — Over-harvesting and leaving too few seeds/trees on board in close games.

#### Player-Count Mistake Traps
--- 2 Players ---
- **Forgetting token removal rule** — Mis-scoring middle 4-leaf collections instead of taking from 3-leaf stack.

subtopics.title: Key Decisions
subtopics.content:
#### Decision 1: Keep Producing vs Harvest Now
- **Keep tree** — Preserve recurring light income across future sun positions.
- **Collect tree** — Lock points now before token stack value drops.

#### Decision 2: Expand Network vs Upgrade Core
- **Expand** — Plant more seeds to increase footprint and tie-break presence.
- **Upgrade** — Grow existing trees for stronger light production and longer seed reach.

#### Decision 3: Denial Shadows vs Own Stability
- **Deny opponents** — Place trees to shadow rival engines.
- **Protect your lane** — Prioritize lines that keep your own trees productive through rotation.

#### Player-Count Context
--- 2 Players ---
- **Value pacing call** — Decide collection timing around altered 4-leaf token handling.

metadata.notes: Written from provided Photosynthesis rulebook text; includes exact component counts and printed setup/action/endgame rules.
